  # EXIT 00 (F3) (0F,22) -> 09 Sundletan (04,22)

  # EXIT 03 (F3) (23,1F) -> 09 Sundletan (04,16)

  # EXIT 05 (F3) (1A,13) -> 09 Sundletan (1F,19)

  # EXIT 01 (F0) (27,08) -> 00 World Map (7B,D7) 1x32

  # NPC 01 (00) X:ff Y:ff [D0-C-50] PRELOAD 5d Fallen Twintails Girl
  # NPC 02 (00) X:1d Y:1d [D0-C-51] PRELOAD 5e Fallen Bald Old Man
  # NPC 03 (00) X:ff Y:ff [D0-C-52] PRELOAD 46 Fallen Man
